science.title: Stanford scientists discover “natural Ozempic” without side effects
science.description: A newly discovered molecule could reshape the future of weight loss treatments by mimicking the powerful appetite-suppressing effects of drugs like Ozempic — but without many of the unpleasant side effects. Identified using artificial intelligence, this tiny peptide, called BRP, appears to act directly on the brain’s appetite-control center, helping animals eat less and lose fat without nausea or muscle loss.

ai.title: Coforge Secures Regulatory Clearances For Encora Acquisition, Targets $2.5 Billion Scale

The combined entity is expected to operate at a 2.5 billion dollar run rate, with a 2 billion dollar core in AI-led engineering, cloud services, and data, alongside planned cost optimization delivering 25 percent G&A savings.
